title: Marketplace Manager - Rapido Consulting Pvt Ltd - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Rapido Consulting Pvt Ltd - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Join the Rapido Consulting Pvt Ltd family as a Marketplace Manager in Ghaziabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Rapido Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Rapido Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rapido Consulting Pvt Ltd!
